title: Sirvicx's vanilla +
description: Modpack that enchances minecraft while maintaining the vanilla feeling: it has a focus to make minecraft optimized and really feel "new" again
body:
This is Sirvicx's vanilla plus, a modpack which overhauls minecraft: 1) It adds some resource packs which are useful , 2) it has a lot of optimization mods (in which there is even bobby, a mod that helps with servers render distances) and 3) it has some mods that basically no other vanilla + modpack uses (from what i know): like first person model...
Try it!
